patch.value: Add vector dimension mismatch warning counter to LanceDB queries

Modified executeVectorQuery in src/core/search/vector-stores.ts to count and report dimension-mismatched records via warnings array instead of silently skipping them. Added warnings field to ExecuteVectorRequestOptions interface.

author: audit-agent
